overview: National Institute of Technology Puducherry (NITPY), located in Karaikal, Puducherry, is a premier autonomous public engineering institute established in 2009 by the Ministry of Education, Government of India. As an Institution of National Importance, it focuses on high-quality technical education, research, and innovation, offering comprehensive undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs across key engineering and science disciplines.
accreditation: An Institution of National Importance approved by the AICTE and Ministry of Education, Government of India.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: General/OBC (Family Income > ₹5 Lakhs): ₹62,500 per semester (Approximately ₹5.00 Lakhs to ₹5.48 Lakhs total tuition fee for 4 years). Full tuition fee waivers apply for SC/ST/PH students and those with family income below ₹1 Lakh per annum.
General/OBC/EWS: Approximately ₹35,000 tuition fee per semester (Total institutional fees around ₹1.40 Lakhs to ₹1.94 Lakhs for 2 years). Tuition waivers are applicable for SC/ST categories.
General/OBC/EWS: Approximately ₹7,500 tuition fee per semester (Total institutional fees around ₹30,000 to ₹83,890 for 2 years).

placements.avgSalary: ₹8.30 LPA (B.Tech overall average), ₹9.70 LPA (M.Tech ECE average)
placements.placementRate: 85% for B.Tech, 66.6% for M.Tech, and 40% for M.Sc students
placements.totalOffers: 169 students successfully placed with 22 students securing double offers
placements.companiesVisited: Zoho, SAP, Tech Mahindra, L&T, TCS, Deloitte, Whirlpool, Accenture, Cognizant
placements.internationalOffers: Limited / Not explicitly disclosed in the latest official report

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are based on JEE Main scores followed by JoSAA/CSAB counseling. M.Tech admissions require valid GATE scores handled through CCMT counseling. M.Sc admissions require IIT JAM scores followed by CCMN counseling.
admissions.importantDates: Follows the National testing schedules of NTA and central counseling timelines of JoSAA/CSAB, CCMT, and CCMN.

campus.area: Sprawling campus situated in Thiruvettakudy, Karaikal, Puducherry - 609609
campus.specialNote: Hostel fees range between ₹35,500 to ₹38,500 per semester for B.Tech and ₹39,300 to ₹42,300 per semester for M.Tech/PhD students (inclusive of mess charges and room rent). A refundable caution deposit of ₹3,500 is collected one-time.

availableScholarships: Central Sector Scholarship Scheme for SC/ST students
Income-linked Tuition Fee Remission/Waiver for B.Tech students
scholarshipsAndAid.details: B.Tech students belonging to General/OBC categories receive a 100% tuition fee waiver if family income is under ₹1 Lakh per annum, and a 2/3rd tuition fee remission if family income falls between ₹1 Lakh and ₹5 Lakhs per annum.

rankings.nirf: Ranked #99 in India under the Engineering Category in NIRF 2025
rankings.naac: Not applicable (An autonomous Institute of National Importance governed directly under the NIT Council)

contact.address: National Institute of Technology Puducherry, Thiruvettakudy, Karaikal, Puducherry 609609
